name: aurora-alert-dialog
title: Aurora Alert Dialog
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Confirmation dialog built on the Aurora modal surface for destructive or high-friction decisions.
docs:
Aurora UI component that installs Aurora Alert Dialog.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/alert-dialog.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-components`.
